argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const username = ('{{ username }}' || '').replace(/^@/, ''); await new Promise(r => { const start = Date.now(); const poll = () => { const primary = document.querySelector('[data-testid="primaryColumn"]'); if (primary) return r(); if (Date.now() - start > 10000) return r(); setTimeout(poll, 500); }; poll(); }); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000)); let attempts = 0; let unfollowBtn = null; while (attempts < 20) { const followBtn = document.querySelector('[data-testid$="-follow"]'); if (followBtn && !followBtn.getAttribute('data-testid').endsWith('-unfollow')) { return [{ status: 'success', message: 'Not following @' + username + ' (already unfollowed).' }]; } unfollowBtn = document.querySelector('[data-testid$="-unfollow"]'); if (unfollowBtn) break; await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500)); attempts++; } if (!unfollowBtn) { return [{ status: 'failed', message: 'Could not find Unfollow button. Are you logged in?' }]; } unfollowBtn.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000)); const confirmBtn = document.querySelector('[data-testid="confirmationSheetConfirm"]'); if (confirmBtn) { confirmBtn.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000)); } const verify = document.querySelector('[data-testid$="-follow"]'); if (verify && !verify.getAttribute('data-testid').endsWith('-unfollow')) { return [{ status: 'success', message: 'Successfully unfollowed @' + username + '.' }]; } return [{ status: 'failed', message: 'Unfollow action initiated but UI did not update.' }]; }
